reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Due to the altitude, it causes a lot of shortness of breath. The procedures are very slow. They should be more efficient.

(Original)
Devido altitude. Da muita falta de ar. Os trâmites são muito demorados. Deveriam ter mais agilidade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWOE9pcDVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We had to spend a night at the gas station because the snow blocked the road to Chile. They welcomed us, kept the convenience store open all night with heating, and provided excellent service. This happened in July 2011.

(Original)
Tivemos que dormir uma noite no posto, pois a neve trancou a passagem para o chile, nos receberam, ficaram com a conveniencia aberta a noite toda com calefação, muito bem atendidos. Isso aconteceu em julho de 2011
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdThtTnhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio de parte del personal, no tiene un internet para lo q es cruzar la frontera ya que no ahí señal. Parte de hospedaje mal. Mal no te cambian las sábanas, después de un viaje largo no tengan lo mínimo impensable q es agua caliente. Se infunda el baño no tiene tapa y por último q te cobran como un hospedaje de 5 estrella la verdad no lo recomiendo a nadie

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the staff. There's no internet access, which is essential for crossing the border since there's no signal. The accommodations are awful. They don't change the sheets, and after a long trip, they don't even have the most basic, unthinkable thing: hot water. The toilet is leaking and doesn't have a lid. And to top it all off, they charge like it's a 5-star hotel. I honestly wouldn't recommend it to anyone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsOFp5YTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Good gas station. They could improve and expand the convenience store.

(Original)
Bom posto. Poderiam  melhorar e ampliar a loja de conveniência.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsbElHSS1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Fuel was fine, I slept in the accommodation they have and the shower didn't get hot. I went to the employee who works at night and he said he would look into it but didn't. Rude and lazy, as he was there doing nothing. I don't recommend this place to sleep.

(Original)
Abastecimento ok,dormi no alojamento que ele tem e o chuveiro não esquentava fui até o funcionário do posto que fica a noite e o mesmo falou que iria ver e não foi. Mal educado e preguiçoso pois estava lá sem fazer nada. Não indico esse lugar para dormir.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbmE3RVR3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) A great border crossing, I highly recommend it to anyone going to Chile to refuel there, or to those returning from there to refuel as well... stop for a coffee with medialunas (crescent-shaped pastries), and continue on your way.

(Original)
um ótimo posto de fronteira, recomendo muito a quem vai ao Chile abastecer ai, ou para quem está retornando de lá, abastecer tbmm...parar tomar um café com média lunas, e seguir.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNseVp6U2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Very good place

(Original)
Muito bom lugar
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNscW9Lam1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) On my trip, I filled up at about 15 different YPF gas stations, all good except for this one. The attendant spilled gasoline in my motorcycle's tank and said he didn't have any water, turned his back and walked away. I had to use bottled water that I had brought to wash the tank.

There were no attendants at the snack bar.

(Original)
Em viagem, abasteci em uns 15 postos ypf diferentes,todos bons, com exceção deste. Frentista derrubou gasolina no tanque da moto e disse não ter água, virou as costas e saiu andando. Tive que usar água mineral que levava para lavar o tanque.
Na lanchonete não havia atendentes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGMGJTUEtREAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) This gas station is very important because it's on the border between Argentina and Chile, and it's a disgrace that an establishment like this is always out of fuel. Today is Sunday, and I've been here since Friday waiting for it to arrive. The same thing happened two weeks ago and last month as well; this is frequent!

(Original)
Posto de grande importância por estar na divisa entre Argentina e Chile e é uma vergonha um estabelecimento como este sempre faltar combustível.  Hoje é domingo e estou aqui desde sexta feira aguardando a chegada. Duas semanas antes ocorreu o mesmo e no mês passado também,  isso é frequente!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGeXVPWnB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Me izó retroceder en el tiempo...

(Translated by Google)
It took me back in time...

(Translated by Google)
Hello! Do you have truck fuel? Infinia?

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Excellent service. On-site snack bar with good sandwiches. Don't forget to fill up if you're going to cross the border because the next gas station won't be until San Pedro.

(Original)
Muito bom atendimento. Lanchonete no local com sanduíches bons. Não deixe de  abastecer se vai cruzar a fronteira porque depois somente em San Pedro haverá outro posto de combustiveis
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1el92Z0V3EAE
